name: Nanjing Central Emporium (Group) Stocks Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Central Emporium (Group) Stocks Co., Ltd. operates department stores. It operates a chain of 14 department stores, as well as an e-commerce online shopping platform. The company is also involved in the development of commercial properties. The company was founded in 1936 and is based in Nanjing, China.
